headline: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: A new platform, Record Club, aims to be the Letterboxd for music lovers. It offers a clean interface for cataloging listening habits. The app focuses on connecting fans, unlike existing crowded platforms.

headline: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn, creator of iconic drum machines like the LM-1 and LinnDrum, is a music tech legend. He remains at the cutting edge of music technology. Linn maintains focus by limiting himself to a single browser tab.

headline: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Discover 38 recommended Memorial Day tech deals priced at $50 or less. Find discounts on gadgets like portable chargers and 4K streaming devices. These affordable options are a great alternative to expensive Memorial Day sales.

headline: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
summary: The author finds comfort in a virtual coffee shop experience set in Tokyo. This review discusses the "Coffee Talk Tokyo" game available on Switch, Xbox, PS5, and Steam. The piece highlights the appeal of finding personal sanctuary in digital spaces.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Confirmed to Feature Drunk Load Screen After Ubisoft Post Confuses Fans
summary: Ubisoft confirms the Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced remake will retain its iconic drunk load screen. Fans were concerned after a confusing Ubisoft post. Edward Kenway's in-game drunken stumbles will return in the Animus loading sequence.

headline: The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
summary: Antony Starr, who plays Homelander in "The Boys," shared spoiler-heavy farewell photos on Instagram. The actor marked the end of his time on the hit series. Fans can see behind-the-scenes glimpses of the show's conclusion.

headline: The Best Deals Today: M5 MacBook Air, AirPods Pro 3, Monster Hunter Stories 3, and More
summary: Explore today's top deals on popular tech and gaming items. Featured discounts include the M5 MacBook Air and AirPods Pro 3. Also find offers on games like Monster Hunter Stories 3.

headline: Kingdom Come Dev Confirms Next Installment Is an 'Open-World RPG' Set to Launch Next Fiscal Year
summary: Warhorse Studios confirms their next Kingdom Come game will be an open-world RPG. The highly anticipated title is slated for launch next fiscal year. Fans can expect a new immersive experience in the Kingdom Come universe.

headline: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
summary: A suspect was killed after firing on Secret Service agents near the White House. The incident occurred at a checkpoint, prompting a rapid response. One bystander was reported wounded during the exchange.

headline: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
summary: Donald Trump claims the Iran deal is "largely negotiated," including the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran also reports progress on talks, but clarifies nuclear weapons aren't part of the initial framework. Negotiations continue on critical international issues.

headline: Heatwave likely to be confirmed as record-breaking temperatures forecast
summary: A severe heatwave is expected to bring record-breaking temperatures. Forecasters predict new national May temperature records on bank holiday Monday. Official confirmation of a heatwave is highly likely.

headline: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate
summary: A strike in Russian-occupied Luhansk killed 18 and injured 42 people. Russia has accused Ukraine and vowed retaliation for the attack. The incident escalates tensions in eastern Ukraine.
